title: Korak 9

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: When called with a card that has a valid year, the year property of the returned object should be a number, not a string.
tests.testString: assert.isNumber(parseCard("The Shining | King, Stephen | 1977 | Shelf K1").year);

tests.text: When called with "The Shining | King, Stephen | 1977 | Shelf K1", the year property should be 1977.
tests.testString: assert.strictEqual(parseCard("The Shining | King, Stephen | 1977 | Shelf K1").year, 1977);

tests.text: When called with a string that has a blank year field, the year property should be "Unknown".

description:
Polje godine stiže kao string, ali vam je potrebno kao broj za kasniji proračun. Koristite parseInt() da ga konvertujete.

Godina takođe može biti prazna, pa vam je potreban rezervni način (fallback). Ternarni operator condition ? valueIfTrue : valueIfFalse vraća jednu od dve vrednosti na osnovu uslova.

Ažurirajte svojstvo year u izjavi za povratak (return) na:

year: year ? parseInt(year) : "Unknown"
